推荐场景: 项目决策会｜综合议程、补充、打断、反对、总结
60秒任务: 「会议 Boss」：议程/打断/反对/总结；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 会议组织｜打断｜反对｜补充｜总结｜决策确认
场景族: 办公室｜会议室｜远程会议｜走廊对话｜协作工具界面
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Let’s bring the discussion back to the objective.（拉回目标）
We need to separate opinions from decisions.（区分观点与决定）
The strongest argument so far is ___.（识别强论点）
The open question is ___.（识别未决问题）
I hear the concern, but we still need a decision.（承接并推进）
Can we turn this into a concrete action?（转化行动）
Let’s check whether there is real agreement.（确认真实共识）
The disagreement seems to be about ___.（定位分歧）
We’re running out of time, so let’s narrow it down.（时间压力下收束）
What decision can we make today?（当场决策）
I’ll capture the unresolved points.（记录未决）
Let’s assign owners before we leave.（离会前分配）
Can we agree on the decision criteria?（确认标准）
This meeting should end with ___.（设定产出）
Does anyone strongly object?（最终异议确认）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: objective, argument, open question, agreement, disagreement, criteria, owner, action
Verbs: decide, narrow down, capture, assign, object, agree, separate, conclude
Adjectives / Status: unresolved, concrete, strong, real, aligned, practical
Time / Place: today, before we leave, by the end, on the call, in the minutes
Chunks: decision criteria, strongly object, narrow it down, concrete action, unresolved points
